findings.cause: Sustained overlay_nm drift at m1_litho across four consecutive lots (1.99→2.96 nm); inline_trace level σ=+5.1 with trailing-window slope 0.31 while WAT parametrics (max |σ|<2) and Sort yield (96.0%) remain in-family.
findings.reasoning: Pre-step flagged lot_038 at score 6.16 (rank 1). inline_trace confirmed monotonic overlay_nm drift at m1_litho: level_sigma=+5.12, trend_slope=0.31, sustained=1.26, out_of_control=true. Signal is subtle lot-to-lot — not visible on standard WAT/Sort gates — but detectable via multi-lot inline trend analysis.
